def veri_isle():

import smtplib
from email.mime.text import MIMEText

def email_gonder(adres, konu, icerik):
    mesaj = MIMEText(icerik)
    mesaj['Subject'] = konu
    mesaj['From'] = 'from@example.com'
    mesaj['To'] = adres
    with smtplib.SMTP('smtp.example.com') as sunucu:
        sunucu.send_message(mesaj)

response:
import time

def sure_olc(fonk, *args):
    basla = time.perf_counter()
    sonuc = fonk(*args)
    bitis = time.perf_counter()
    return sonuc, bitis - basla

#print(sure_olc(sum, range(1000000)))

t2 = threading.Thread(target=arttir)
t1.start()
t2.start()
t1.join()
t2.join()
#print(sayac)
```
response:
import threading

sayac = 0
kilit = threading.Lock()

def arttir():
    global sayac
    for _ in range(100000):
        with kilit:
            sayac += 1

t1 = threading.Thread(target=arttir)
t2 = threading.Thread(target=arttir)
t1.start()
t2.start()
t1.join()
t2.join()
#print(sayac)

import subprocess
import platform

def ping_at(host):
    param = '-n' if platform.system().lower() == 'windows' else '-c'
    return subprocess.run(['ping', param, '1', host], capture_output=True, text=True).returncode == 0

#print(ping_at('google.com'))

```
response:
SELECT k.isim, COUNT(s.id) as siparis_sayisi
FROM kullanicilar k
LEFT JOIN siparisler s ON k.id = s.kullanici_id AND s.tarih > '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY k.isim;

instruction:
Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT isim, yas FROM kullanicilar HAVING yas > 18;
```
response: SELECT isim, yas FROM kullanicilar WHERE yas > 18;

instruction:
Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE isim IS NULL;
```
response: SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE isim IS NULL OR isim = '';

instruction:
Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT id, 
    CASE WHEN yas > 18 THEN 'Yetiskin'
         WHEN yas > 12 THEN 'Genc'
    END as kategori
FROM kullanicilar;
```
response:
SELECT id, 
    CASE 
        WHEN yas > 18 THEN 'Yetiskin'
        WHEN yas > 12 THEN 'Genc'
        ELSE 'Cocuk'
    END as kategori
FROM kullanicilar;

instruction:
Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT * FROM kullanicilar CROSS JOIN siparisler;
```
response:
SELECT * FROM kullanicilar
INNER JOIN siparisler ON kullanicilar.id = siparisler.kullanici_id;

instruction:

```sql
SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE yas > ANY (SELECT yas FROM kullanicilar WHERE sehir = 'Istanbul');
```
response: SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE yas > (SELECT AVG(yas) FROM kullanicilar WHERE sehir = 'Istanbul');

Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE sehir = 'Istanbul' OR sehir = 'Ankara' AND yas > 25;
```
response: SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE (sehir = 'Istanbul' OR sehir = 'Ankara') AND yas > 25;

instruction:
Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM kullanicilar) AS alt_sorgu WHERE alt_sorgu.yas > (SELECT AVG(yas) FROM kullanicilar);
```
response: SELECT * FROM kullanicilar WHERE yas > (SELECT AVG(yas) FROM kullanicilar);

instruction:
Bu SQL kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```sql
SELECT sehir, COUNT(*) FROM kullanicilar GROUP BY sehir HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kullanicilar WHERE sehir = 'Istanbul');
```
response:
SELECT sehir, COUNT(*) FROM kullanicilar GROUP BY sehir
HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kullanicilar WHERE sehir = 'Istanbul') / 2;

def veri_isle(veri):

import html

def embed_video(url):
    guvenli_url = html.escape(url)
    return f'<iframe src="{guvenli_url}"></iframe>'

print(embed_video('https://example.com/video'))

Bu Go kodundaki hatayi bul ve duzelt:
```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
    var x int = 10
    var p *int = &x
    fmt.Println(p)  // adres yazdirmak
    fmt.Println(*p) // 10
    p = nil
    fmt.Println(*p) // panic
}
```
